items.name: sql-backup-intelligence
items.description: AI-driven SQL Server backup monitoring framework for anomaly detection, SLA risk analysis, Predictive Failure Risk and operational telemetry insights using Python and machine learning

items.name: bristol-ml
items.description: Framework code to discuss, design and implement in Bristol Machine Learning and Data Science meetups

items.name: career-guidance-backend
items.description: AI-powered career guidance system built with Django REST Framework and machine learning.

items.name: phishing-detector
items.description: A Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for Detecting Phishing Attacks in Web Traffic

items.name: AgML
items.description: AgML is a centralized framework for agricultural machine learning. AgML provides access to public agricultural datasets for common agricultural deep learning tasks, with standard benchmarks and pretrained models, as well the ability to generate synthetic data and annotations.

items.name: macrolab-site
items.description: Framework modular de inteligência preditiva para análise de sustentabilidade fiscal e risco soberano. Integra modelos de Machine Learning (Random Forest) e econometria avançada (SPJ) com dados em tempo real da FRED e BCB. Base técnica da tese de Éuriks Souza Davalo

items.name: financial-distress-prediction-imbalance-aware
items.description: Imbalance-aware machine learning framework for enterprise financial distress prediction using ensemble learning, SMOTE oversampling, and SHAP explainability analysis.

items.name: Heart-Disease-Classification-Analysis
items.description: This Machine Learning project presents a rigorous, leakage-aware hybrid soft-voting ensemble framework combining k-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Random Forest (RF) for heart disease prediction on the UCI Cleveland dataset.

items.name: Early-prediction-framework-for-arthritis-using-machine-learning-algorithm
items.description: Machine learning project for predicting arthritis risk levels using CatBoost, XGBoost, and healthcare datasets

items.name: kmeans_nn_ILF_london_smart_meters
items.description: Kmeans-NN method for Individual Load Forecasting and online fault detection in smart meters, following the article: Tayseer, M., Talaat, M., Zamel, A.A. et al. "Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.

items.name: music-energy-prediction-research-project
items.description: Developed a machine learning model to predict music energy from psychographic data using Scikit-Learn, achieving 82.14% accuracy and an 0.85 ROC-AUC score with an optimized Random Forest classifier, validated by a custom overfitting framework.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Framework-for-the-Detection-of-Mental-Stress-main
items.description: A real-time Face Emotion Recognition (FER) system that uses a deep Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model to detect mental stress levels during online learning environments. The system captures emotional cues from facial expressions to determine stress, enhancing digital mental health monitoring.

items.name: sleep-quality-prediction-research-project
items.description: Developed a machine learning model to predict sleep quality from lifestyle data using Scikit-Learn, achieving 85.19% accuracy and an 0.88 ROC-AUC score with an optimized Random Forest classifier, validated by a custom overfitting framework.

items.name: CHURNGUARD
items.description: A machine learning framework for predicting customer attrition in telecommunication.

items.name: pfund
items.description: An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.

items.name: ebma-icu-readmission
items.description: Ensemble Bayesian Model Averaging (EBMA)-based framework combining 25 deep learning, machine learning, and clinical scoring models for 30-day ICU readmission prediction on MIMIC-III.

items.name: CardioTwin-AI-of-your-heart
items.description: CardioTwin AI is a personalized digital twin framework designed for predictive cardiac health and diagnostic optimization. It integrates a 3D heart model developed in Blender with data-driven machine learning to visualize and analyze heart health. The platform features an AI-powered chatbot within a custom user interface.

items.name: QRC-Volatility-Forecasting
items.description: A Python framework for volatility forecasting using Quantum Reservoir Computing (Qiskit) and GARCH (Arch). Benchmarks quantum machine learning against econometric baselines on S&P 500 data.

items.name: urban-sprawl-monitoring-gee-ml
items.description: AI-powered urban sprawl monitoring and 2030 prediction framework using GHSL, Sentinel-2, Google Earth Engine, and Machine Learning for Chennai, Hyderabad, and Bengaluru.

items.name: MitoVeritas
items.description: A machine learning framework for accurate low-frequency mtDNA mutation detection by identifying and removing NUMT-derived artifacts. Integrates DNA-RNA dual-omics and multi-dimensional features to robustly distinguish genuine mitochondrial mutations from nuclear mitochondrial DNA segments (NUMTs) contamination.

items.name: Blockchain-forensics-for-pig-butchering-scam-2210992075-
items.description: A machine learning-based framework that analyzes Ethereum transaction data to identify suspicious wallet addresses linked to pig butchering scams. The system uses feature extraction and a Random Forest classifier to detect high-risk wallets based on transaction behavior patterns, enabling efficient fraud detection and blockchain investigation.

items.name: DiaPipeline-A-Production-Ready-ML-Framework
items.description: A production-ready Machine Learning pipeline for Diabetes prediction. This project demonstrates advanced software engineering practices in ML, featuring custom Scikit-Learn transformers, modular architecture, automated outlier handling, and hyperparameter tuning using GridSearchCV.

items.name: dml-keyword-intent-measurement
items.description: Double Machine Learning framework for correcting selection bias in keyword-level advertising measurement and incrementality estimation.

items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: An-Hybrid-ensemble-learning-for-multidisease-prediction-system
items.description: A Hybrid Ensemble Learning Framework designed to predict multiple diseases using integrated machine learning algorithms like SVM, Random Forest, and Logistic Regression.

items.name: churn-semma
items.description: Atividade de Machine Learning utilizando o Framework SEMMA

items.name: AI-Powered-Audit-Fraud-Detection-System-Credit-Card-
items.description: This project presents an AI-driven Audit & Fraud Detection framework designed to identify suspicious financial transactions within a highly imbalanced dataset. The system combines Machine Learning with Explainable AI (XAI) techniques to deliver accurate, transparent, and auditable risk predictions.

items.name: LEAF-Locust-Early-Alert-Framework
items.description: LEAF (Locust Early Alert Framework) is an AI-powered agricultural monitoring system designed to predict and visualize locust outbreak risks using machine learning and real-time environmental insights. The platform provides interactive dashboards, risk analytics, and smart alert support for farmers and government authorities.

items.name: Gender-Bias-Salary-Ethics-Audit
items.description: Statistical audit and Machine Learning analysis of workplace pay equity. Investigating gender bias in salary structures and implementing ethical AI frameworks for HR decision-making.

items.name: scikit-learn_bench
items.description: scikit-learn_bench benchmarks various implementations of machine learning algorithms across data analytics frameworks. It currently support the scikit-learn, DAAL4PY, cuML, and XGBoost frameworks for commonly used machine learning algorithms.

items.name: Secure-FL-for-UAV
items.description: Secure Federated Learning Framework for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is a privacy-preserving and attack-resilient distributed learning framework designed for collaborative intelligence in UAV networks. The framework enables multiple UAVs to train shared machine learning models without exchanging raw data.

items.name: Gradient-Boosting-House-Price-Prediction
items.description: Machine learning project using a Gradient Boosting framework to predict housing prices.

items.name: MASPY
items.description: A Python Framework for Multi-Agent Programming with Machine Learning

items.name: ProdNet
items.description: is a neural network framework designed to discover efficient matrix multiplication algorithms using machine learning, specifically through tensor decomposition techniques.

items.name: Fraud_detection_with_stackelberg_game
items.description: We created a robust framework in UPI and banking fraud detection using adversarial game and machine learning

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: LEMONsc
items.description: Framework for  mass estimation of massive objects in astrophysical collision-driven systems using machine learning models

items.name: property-driven-ml
items.description: A generalised framework for property-driven machine learning, combining input region specification via hyper-rectangles with differentiable logics to compile logical constraints into loss.

items.name: IntegratedPipeline-Specialized-Non-LLM-AI-Agent-Framework
items.description: [~]  IntegratedPipeline is a standalone AI Agent Library for Non-LLM memory Augmented Agentic Framework, Specifically designed to provide Agentic capability for any Autonomous Agentic Framework locally and Coordinatively that runs efficiently on Consumer based machine to High end embedded systems, While continuously learning and runs efficiently.

items.description: Cohesive zone framework for hydrogen embrittlement in Inconel 600 with machine-learning surrogate analysis

items.description: Flood hazard mapping system using physically-informed machine learning and deep learning models for Swat Valley.

items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: Latent-Representation-of-Cross-Domain-Materials-Machine-Learning
items.description: A reproducible framework for auditing domain alignment in latent representations learned from heterogeneous materials datasets. Combines shared-fit PCA/UMAP visualizations, domain separability metrics, and centroid geometry to assess alignment independently of predictive performance.

items.description: GOAL (General Open Atomistic Laboratory) is a Python framework for training machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) on atomistic systems.

items.description: Automated machine learning pipelines with SageMakerJumpstart enable scalable, adaptive hyperparameter tuning and real-time data processing orchestration framework.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: LAB-Score
items.description: LAB-Score is a safety-gated genomic framework for prioritizing lactic acid bacteria candidates using genome annotation, AMR/safety screening, functional trait panels, CAZyme profiling, machine-learning interpretation, and interactive strain-level radar reports.

items.name: AI-Driven-Infrastructure-Risk-Analytics
items.description: AI-driven infrastructure risk analytics framework using Machine Learning, SMOTE, Random Forest, and Power BI.

items.name: Bayesian-Explainable-AI-for-Alzheimer-Risk-Assessment
items.description: This project presents a trustworthy and explainable healthcare AI framework for early Alzheimer disease risk using machine learning, explainable AI, concept-aware reasoning, and Bayesian-inspired uncertainty estimation.  The system is designed as a clinical decision-support prototype capable of: - predicting Alzheimer risk

items.name: Project-ChurnGuard
items.description: "Project ChurnGuard is a strategic predictive analytics solution developed to mitigate customer attrition in a high-volume database of 11,260 active accounts. Facing a baseline 16.84% churn rate and to build a robust machine learning framework to transit business operation to proactive retention rather than reactive measures.

items.name: Hybrid_malware_detection_framework
items.description: AI-powered Hybrid Malware Detection Framework that combines static and dynamic analysis with machine learning to detect and classify malicious software. The system analyzes file behavior, API calls, and runtime activities to identify cyber threats with improved accuracy and reduced false positives.

items.name: Live-Event-Intelligence-Commentary
items.description: 🚀Live, multi-source sports event intelligence platform engineered with distributed, low-latency architecture that delivers real-time AI-generated commentary, predictive analytics, and context-aware insights. It leverages advanced machine learning pipelines, natural language generation(NLG) and stream processing frameworks to provide dynamic play.

items.name: Credit-Risk-A-B-Test-Logistic-Regression-vs-LightGBM
items.description: An end-to-end machine learning A/B testing framework for credit default prediction - comparing a traditional Logistic Regression scorecard against a LightGBM gradient boosting model

items.name: tauro
items.description: Es un framework avanzado para la ejecución de pipelines de datos que combina automatización, escalabilidad y flexibilidad. Diseñado para simplificar la gestión de flujos de trabajo complejos de datos, desde ETL tradicionales hasta pipelines de Machine Learning.

items.name: felipearocha
items.description: Asset Integrity Engineer bridging RBI decision frameworks, data engineering, and applied machine learning through transparent automation.

items.name: A-Comparative-Study-of-Global-and-Bangladeshi-Student-Dropout-Prediction-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: Machine learning-based student dropout prediction framework comparing global (Kaggle) and local (Bangladesh) datasets. Includes feature engineering, SHAP-based explainability, ensemble models, and an early-warning system for academic interventions.

items.name: quantum
items.description: An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval
items.description: Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.name: mexico-hypertension-risk-prediction
items.description: Machine Learning framework to identify hypertension risk factors in the Mexican population using ENSANUT 2022 biometric data.

items.name: MACLAS
items.description: MACLAS stands for Mineral Archaeological CLASsification. A machine-learning based framework for mineral classification of personal adornment objects. It is a complementary material to the paper "A supervised multiclass framework for mineral classification of Iberian beads".

items.name: Aegis-Ai
items.description: Aegis AI is an intelligent, automated security framework designed to provide a proactive shield against modern cyber threats. By leveraging machine learning models, Aegis AI analyzes network traffic in real-time to detect anomalies, mitigate DDoS attacks, and identify potential vulnerabilities before they can be exploited.

items.name: MultiWalk
items.description: Decentralized machine learning framework

items.name: SCI-GENOME-AI-Scientific-Fraud-Detection-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: SCI GENOME AI is an AI/ML-based framework that detects suspicious scientific papers using NLP, anomaly detection, and citation analysis. The system predicts fraud probability and generates Scientific Trust Scores using explainable machine learning models and advanced visual analytics.

items.name: Autonomous-Blast-PPV-Prediction
items.description: Autonomous hybrid machine learning framework for accurate prediction of blast-induced ground vibration (PPV) in surface mining operations.

items.name: AcadeScore
items.description: A Random Forest Machine Learning Framework for Tracking Student Performance Based on Lifestyle Factors

items.name: autoware-ml
items.description: Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

items.name: hybrid-gnn-fraud-intel
items.description: A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend

items.name: Hybrid-Explainable-Framework-for-Stroke-Prediction
items.description: AI-powered system for early stroke prediction that combines machine learning, deep learning, and explainable AI techniques. This comprehensive framework enhances predictive accuracy while ensuring clinical interpretability and fairness in healthcare applications.

items.name: Water-Monitoring-Research-Satellite-and-Machine-learning-framework-
items.description: This research proposes a satellite remote sensing and machine learning framework for monitoring Weija Reservoir in Accra, Ghana, as a cost-effective and spatially comprehensive alternative to the traditional water quality monitoring methods currently used at the reservoir.

items.name: AI-PQDS-Coherent-WDM
items.description: AI-driven framework for secure coherent WDM systems with machine learning optimization and post-quantum cryptography integration.

items.name: hindi-audio-annotation-guidelines
items.description: An enterprise-grade data curation framework for standardizing complex Hindi and Hinglish audio. Features strict annotation guidelines, QA workflows, and schema validation to process regional accents, acoustic noise, and code-switching edge cases for machine learning pipelines.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

items.name: CRC-Automatic-Classification
items.description: A project leveraging machine learning to classify CRC recommendations into thematic clusters, bottlenecks, and sub-domains of the ECA Child Rights Monitoring Framework. This project enhances efficiency and accuracy in monitoring child rights, supporting UNICEF's work in Europe and Central Asia.

items.name: Climate-ML
items.description: About A machine learning framework to correct the "aridity blindspot" by distinguishing drought from chronic aridity. It enables accurate spatio-temporal analysis and forecasting of water stress in Central Africa, offering a robust tool for risk management in vulnerable regions.

items.name: refiner
items.description: Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets

items.name: FW_XFL
items.description: The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

items.name: ml-perf-framework
items.description: A Decision-Aware Machine Learning Framework for Pre-Execution Latency Prediction across Systems A, B, and C

items.name: Xsmell
items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Code Smell Detection and Refactoring Recommendation

items.name: ProteasAI-HIV
items.description: In this approach, we developed ProteaseAI-HIV, a comprehensive multimodal artificial intelligence framework with six complementary descriptor classes, integrated with classical machine learning, deep learning, and ensemble meta-learning strategies, to predict HIV-1 protease cleavage sites using experimentally validated octameric substrates.

items.name: Diabetes-Complication-Risk-Prediction-Model
items.description: A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

items.name: qml-fourier-dynamics
items.description: A high-performance quantum machine learning framework for PAC-learning quantum dynamics via Fourier feature extraction and Quantum Overlap Kernels (Barthe et al., 2025).

items.name: Improved-Molecular-Graph-Aggregation-Strategies-for-Robust-Prediction-of-ADME
items.description: In this study, we present a systematic benchmarking framework to evaluate molecular representation strategies for ADME prediction, comparing classical descriptor-based machine learning models with graph neural network (GNN) architectures implemented within a message passing and aggregation paradigm.

items.name: City-Wise-Crime-Analysis-and-Prediction
items.description: A Machine Learning Based Framework for City-Wise Crime Analysis and Forecasting using monthly aggregated time-series data.

items.name: heat
items.description: Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

items.name: kiteML
items.description: KiteML is an intelligent end-to-end machine learning engineering ecosystem for Python. It combines automated ML pipelines, intelligent data profiling, production deployment, drift monitoring, experiment tracking, CLI workflows, plugin architecture, and MLOps tooling into a unified developer-first framework.
